emails.subject: Re: Legal
emails.body: Re: Legal Mark, Considering that we are using US law, can I assume that the Japanese clients will use US PA's and ETA's? If not, could you please send us the appropriate contracts? Thanks in advance, Mario Parra Cardoso EnronOnline Rousseau Anai@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 04/16/2000 06:23 PM
